fruits.name: Tomato

excel_formulas.yield_per_plot: =1+IF(Skills!$B$52=TRUE,Skills!$F$52,0)+IF(Skills!$B$63=TRUE,Skills!$F$63,0)+IF(NFTs!$B$109=TRUE,NFTs!$G$109,0)+IF(NFTs!$B$124=TRUE,NFTs!$G$124,0)+IF(Skills!$B$68=TRUE,Skills!$F$68,0)+IF(NFTs!$B$103=TRUE,NFTs!$G$103,0)+IF(NFTs!$B$113=TRUE,NFTs!$G$113,0)+(Buds!L21)+IF(AND(Shrine!$I$30=TRUE,OR(Combo!$Y$32="Average Profit per Day",Combo!$Y$32="Lucro Médio por Dia")),Shrine!$O$30,0)

formula_notes.excel_formula_source: The workbook calculates buffed values in Informações CropsFrutasGH columns K:Q and the result tables in CropsGHFruits / Combo.
formula_notes.net_profit_day_flower: best_gross_day_flower - restock_gems_per_day * gem_cost_flower, when restock is enabled
formula_notes.base_values: Calculations now use unboosted SFL Hub base values first. Excel current values are retained only as reference in excel_current/excel_formulas.
